overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in ornate robes descending a grand gothic staircase inside a castle, following a child through torch-lit corridors with stained glass windows, and approaching a large carved wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper castle corridor with stained glass windows

events.description: child character in school robes comes into view walking ahead down the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking down a stone staircase in a gothic castle corridor with stained glass windows

notable_agents.action: child in dark robes with red scarf walking ahead down the stairs

entered.detail: tall blue gothic windows lining the left wall
carved stone balustrade along the right side of the stairs
lit lantern mounted on stone pillar
wooden bench with red cushion against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow stone staircase in a gothic castle corridor illuminated by wall lanterns and blue light filtering through tall stained glass windows. Around the 4-second mark, a child in school robes comes into view ahead, walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with high ceilings

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into large grand staircase hall with ornate architecture
reaching the bottom landing of the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: following the child down the grand staircase, passing flaming braziers and portraits

notable_agents.action: child continuing down the grand staircase ahead of the player

entered.detail: large central stone staircase descending to lower level
burning fire bowls on ornate stone stands
elaborately carved stone banister with gothic details
framed portraits hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand hall with a large central staircase. The character follows the child down the stairs, passing flaming braziers and portrait paintings on the walls. The architecture features ornate stone railings and high ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower hall with large ornate door

events.description: transitioning from descending stairs to walking on flat hall floor
stopping in front of the large carved door

agents.ego_description: walking across the hall floor toward the large ornate door, following the child

notable_agents.action: child walking toward the large door and stopping in front of it

entered.detail: tall carved wooden door with intricate metal detailing and gothic patterns
massive stone columns supporting the hall ceiling
wall-mounted torch lights illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: Having reached the bottom of the stairs, the character walks across the stone floor of the lower hall toward a massive ornate wooden door. The child leads the way to the door, which features intricate metal carvings. Portrait paintings line the right wall as they approach the destination.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle that transitions from a narrow, dimly lit corridor into a grand, open hall. It begins with the character descending a stone staircase illuminated by wall lanterns and blue light filtering through tall stained glass windows, soon revealing a child in school robes walking ahead. As the path opens, the camera follows the child down a larger central staircase characterized by ornate stone railings, high ceilings, and flaming braziers. The scene then shifts to the stone floor of the lower hall, where the camera tracks the pair past a series of portrait paintings lining the wall. Finally, the movement concludes as they approach a massive ornate wooden door featuring intricate metal carvings.
